steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0031 worktree branch from main and plan the step list.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0026 and t0027 are completed and load their result files for downstream analyses.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Initialize task folder structure (no new asset subfolders since expected_assets is empty).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: methodology (McNemar exact-binomial, Wilson CIs) is standard; no new paper review needed.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no external information needed for analyses on existing local outputs.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Inventory t0026/t0027 results, predictions, and logs to anchor the load helper and audit walk.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Write plan/plan.md for the four bounded no-new-API analyses with $0.00 budget and local CPU only.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local CPU only; no remote machines.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement load helper and four analysis scripts, run them locally, save predictions-derived tables and charts.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: scope is locked to four bounded analyses; creative redesign belongs to a later brainstorm.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: this is salvage analysis on internal outputs, not a literature comparison.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md (with required headline label) and results_detailed.md, plus metrics/costs/remote_machines JSON.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write suggestions.json with follow-up redesign ideas; no work spawned from t0031.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run pre-merge verifier, create PR, merge, and refresh overview on main.
